lines: Oyera, Oyera, Oyera! Mulungu wa mphamvu zonse!
Oyera, Oyera, Oyera! Mulungu wa mphamvu zonse!
Mpingo Woyera! wa kwa anthu onse;
Akazi amasiye, maka ndi ana'wo onsewo;
PAPHIRI ndi padambo, Ponsepo pali Mlungu;
Pyenda ife m'njira, Mpoima pali Mlungu.
Kumwamba ndi pansipo, Ponsepo pali Mlungu.
Okwawa pansi inu, Oyenda m'madzi inu;
Oyesa dziko n'kwanu, A m'mlengalenga inu.
Nonsenu ntchito zake, Muona tsiku n'tsiku;
Nditama mphamvu yake, Ya Mlungu yondizinga;
N'kalowa imfa ine, Alipo Mlungu wanga.
Mwa fuko la Davide mwana wake;
Ali mu mdima ndi mu imfa;

hymns.title: AMBUYE, tsopano lino monga mwa mawu anu aja
